description: Combines drag and drop area for files and a list that represents current selection.

props.multiple: Allows multiple files to be uploaded.
props.scrim: Determines whether an overlay is used when hovering over the component with files. Accepts true/false to enable background, and string to define color.
props.insetFileList: Renders the file list inside the dropzone container instead of below it.
props.showSize: Shows the size of the file.

slots.divider: Slot for the divider between icon and the browse button.
slots.icon: Slot for a custom appearance in icon section.
slots.single: Slot for customizing the appearance of a single file when using inset file list mode.

exposed.controlRef: Reference to the underlying input control element.
